chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 876 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.3801/2023 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 3. For orders on CMA No.3802/2023 (Ex./A) 4. For hearing of main case 01.06.2023 Petitioner Qurban Ali Maitlo, present in person..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency application is granted. 2 to 4. Through instant petition, the petitioner seeks his appointment against the plot donation on the ground that SCARP Tube-well No. A-27 of SCARP Tube-well Division, Khairpur has been installed in his land and it was decided that the respondents/Executive Engineer, SCARP, Khairpur shall give him job at the said tube-well. It is an admitted position that the land where alleged tube-well has been installed is not owned by the petitioner as per record. Besides, in the case of Government of Sindh and others versus Loung Khan Rajper and others (Civil Appeals No. 19-K to 50-K of 2015), job against plot donation has been held/declared by the Hon’ble Supreme Court of Pakistan as illegal; hence, this petition being devoid of merits is dismissed in limine along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
